name: Paddle Up Pickleball Club - Chesterfield
description: Paddle Up Pickleball Club in Chesterfield is open to the public 7 days a week. Located at The District in the Chesterfield Valley, they have 7 premium indoor courts, with great lighting, friendly staff, and they even have 2 pickleball simulators which are fun for all skill levels. They host a range of programs, from paddle stacking at drop-in play, to organized play, leagues and social events. It's also a great place to host a birthday party or group outing, as they partner with various restaurants at The District.
fees: Fee required — Membership is not required to play. Visitors pay a guest fee on members private court or a higher rate for programs.
